column1: # Parked determinism baseline. This preserves diagnostics for the retired biology, compose,
# foundation, and sim packages. It is historical coverage, not canonical evidence or admission.
# The legacy viewer remains outside the state scan because its wall-clock reads serve rendering.

column4: profiling timer accumulates elapsed nanoseconds for stderr reporting and never stores wall time in simulation state
six tick_timed phase measurements return diagnostics only; the seventh site is a test-only worker benchmark
retired manifest uses key lookups and preserves declaration order in a separate Vec for every ordered walk
